query: I'm shipping a major refactor of the payment gateway that handles ~$2M/day. Needs adversarial review because if anything's wrong, money is at stake. Branch is feat/payment-gateway-v3, ~800 lines changed across 12 files. Be really thorough — I'd rather you find 3 false positives than miss one real bug
Do a serious audit of this auth migration in src/auth/oauth2/. We've been burned before by token-leak bugs. Don't be shy about finding stuff. Multiple persona perspectives, debate the findings

Critical pre-merge review — this PR handles GDPR deletion requests (#1247 on github.com/myco/backend). Every edge case matters. Take your time. I need confidence we haven't missed anything subtle around what 'deleted' actually means

Pre-merge audit for the new pricing logic in src/billing/pricing/. I need confidence that we haven't missed anything subtle — there are interlocking discount rules, coupon stacking, and tax handling. Be exhaustive
Be rigorous about this. Multiple rounds if needed. Critical code path, can't afford false confidence. It's the new transaction reconciliation job — runs nightly, handles ~50M rows, can't break

Hostile-style review please — try hard to find what's broken in this spec. Third revision of a complex spec for the new event sourcing architecture. I want the kind of review where reviewers argue with each other

I want every persona arguing with each other on this — design review for the new ML inference pipeline architecture. doc is at docs/designs/inference-v2.md. Don't let weak agreement masquerade as consensus

Maximum scrutiny on this database migration — adds a not-null column to a 200M-row table with backfill. We literally can't roll it back if something goes wrong. Want adversarial review of the migration plan
Heavyweight review needed. New auth provider integration, customer-facing, can't have outages. I want competing solutions for any issue you find — not just one fix, multiple options that get debated
Hey can you review my PR really fast? I just need a sanity check before merging — a small change to docs and one bug fix. Don't need anything elaborate
Just give me a quick scan for typos and obvious issues in this design doc — I'm presenting it at standup in 20 min and I don't need a comprehensive audit
Schedule a code review session with Maya and the platform team for next Tuesday at 2pm. Add it to our shared calendar and send a Zoom link
What's the deep meaning of this poem? I'm trying to analyze the symbolism in 'The Waste Land' for my book club next week
Do a deep dive on Postgres locking semantics for me — I need to understand row-level vs predicate locks before I write a design doc on it
Audit my expense report — I expensed a $4500 conference trip and want to make sure all the receipts are attached and the categories are right before submitting
I want a thorough review — but only of the test files in test/integration/, not the implementation. Just looking for missing test coverage, not bugs in the production code
Look at this Python code and tell me if it'll compile — i'm not a Python person and I'm worried about syntax errors before I run it
Review my SQL query for performance issues — it's doing a full table scan and I want to understand why, plus suggestions on indexes
Be thorough when explaining this algorithm to me — I want to understand exactly how the consensus protocol in our raft implementation works, step by step
We had a postmortem last week — review the action items from it and tell me which ones still need owners. The doc is in our team wiki
